description: An addictive slide-and-merge puzzle game. Combine identical numbers to double their value and strive for the elusive 2048 tile.
controls: Arrow keys or WASD to slide tiles in all directions.

title: Tetris Lite
description: The ultimate tile-matching block puzzle. Rotate, move, and drop falling tetrominoes to clear rows and prevent stacks from reaching the top.
controls: Arrow keys: Left/Right to move, Up to rotate, Down for soft drop. Keyboard space: Hard drop.
iframe: <iframe src="https://chvin.github.io/react-tetris/" style="width:100%; height:100%; border:0; background:#111;" allowfullscreen="true" scrolling="no"></iframe>

title: Hextris
description: A fast-paced hexa-matching arcade game. Spin the central hexagon to catch falling colored bars and prevent them from piling out of bounds.
controls: Left and Right arrows to rotate the central hexagonal block.
iframe: <iframe src="https://hextris.github.io/hextris/" style="width:100%; height:100%; border:0;" allowfullscreen="true" scrolling="no"></iframe>

title: Flappy Bird Cl.
description: Steer a small, fragile bird through columns of green pipes. Highly addictive gameplay where a single touch means game over.
controls: Spacebar, mouse click, or tap on the screen to flap wings and gain height.
iframe: <iframe src="https://nebez.github.io/floppybird/" style="width:100%; height:100%; border:0;" allowfullscreen="true" scrolling="no"></iframe>

title: Pac-Man Arcade
description: The definitive 8-bit arcade legend. Navigate the grid-like maze, eat Pac-Dots, avoid the colored ghosts, and devour them after eating Power Pellets.
controls: Use Arrow keys to control your movement inside the maze.

title: Sinuous Evade
description: A beautiful physics-inspired dodge game. Drag your glowing line through a galaxy of floating red hazards while collecting green shield powerups.
controls: Move your mouse cursor to guide your particle tail around screen hazards.
iframe: <iframe src="https://www.sinuousgame.com/" style="width:100%; height:100%; border:0;" allowfullscreen="true" scrolling="no"></iframe>

title: Tower Stack
description: Test your reflexes and depth-perception. Drop massive skyscraper levels precisely on top of each other. The taller you build, the shakier it gets.
controls: Press Spacebar, left mouse click, or screen tap to release the swinging block.

title: Minesweeper
description: Exercise strategic thinking. Uncover squares on a board while avoiding hidden mines, using numerical clues in surrounding grid cells.
controls: Left Click to clear safety square, Right Click (or long press) to flag a suspected mine.
iframe: <iframe src="https://beejjorgensen.github.io/minesweeper/" style="width:100%; height:100%; border:0; background:white;" allowfullscreen="true" scrolling="no"></iframe>
